summary.business_type: SaaS / Web app (AI roleplay platform) with Publisher-style content marketing
top_findings: No canonical tags on any page (duplicate-URL risk; ?utm_source variants return 200)
No Open Graph / Twitter Card images — social shares render as bare text
Zero JSON-LD structured data across all templates
No images in SSR HTML — no image SEO, missing engagement visuals
Missing security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
quick_wins: Add canonical + OG/Twitter image globally via useSeoMeta
Submit sitemap.xml in Google Search Console

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt allows all, disallows /app, declares sitemap
Valid sitemap with 33 URLs, all with lastmod

findings.title: No canonical link tags
findings.description: <link rel=canonical> absent on home, character, and guide templates. ?utm_source=test returns HTTP 200 identical to /, so each query variant is a separately-indexable duplicate.
findings.recommendation: Emit <link rel=canonical href=baseURL+route.path> stripped of query params on every page.

findings.title: Missing security headers
findings.description: No content-security-policy, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy, or permissions-policy. Only HSTS present.
findings.recommendation: Add vercel.json headers block; baseline CSP + nosniff + referrer-policy + permissions-policy.

findings.title: /app returns 200 to direct requests
findings.description: /app is disallowed in robots.txt but returns 200; relies entirely on robots honoring.
findings.recommendation: Add X-Robots-Tag: noindex for /app* as defense-in-depth.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Homepage 889 words of genuine on-topic copy
Unique persona-rich titles and descriptions per character
Clear H1 -> H2 -> H3 hierarchy, single H1 per page

findings.title: No author / E-E-A-T trust signals
findings.description: No About, author bios, or contact page visible in templates.
findings.recommendation: Add /about and /contact pages linked in footer.

findings.title: Guide depth moderate for competitive terms
findings.recommendation: Expand guides with screenshots, FAQ, internal links to characters.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Titles 50-65 chars, keyword-forward, consistent brand suffix

findings.title: No Open Graph / Twitter Card tags
findings.description: og:image, og:type, og:url, twitter:card absent across all templates.
findings.recommendation: Set og:type=website, og:url, og:image (1200x630), twitter:card globally; override per character.

findings.title: No hreflang
findings.description: Acceptable while English-only; add when shipping additional languages.

findings.title: Zero JSON-LD on every page type
findings.description: application/ld+json appears 0 times on home, character, and guide pages. No Organization, WebSite, WebPage, Article, or BreadcrumbList.
findings.recommendation: Site-wide Organization + WebSite; Article + BreadcrumbList on character/guide pages; HowTo on step guides. Use nuxt-schema-org.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: LCP element is text (no large images) — likely fast LCP

findings.title: Field data not collected
findings.description: Plugin Python runtime not provisioned; CrUX/PageSpeed unavailable. Scores are lab estimates.
findings.recommendation: Install python3.10-venv, run /seo setup, then /seo google setup (Tier 0) for real CWV.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Well-written on-topic content is a good base
Question-style FAQ section exists on homepage

findings.title: Weak citability + no entity signals
findings.description: No schema (entities), no og:image, low attribution density. llms.txt is NOT a lever per Google's AI Optimization Guide — do not chase it.
findings.recommendation: Prioritize Schema + trust fixes; add 130-170 word answer-style intro blocks on character pages.

findings.title: No images in server-rendered HTML
findings.description: 0 img, 0 picture, 0 nuxt-img, 0 background-image on home, character, guide pages.
findings.recommendation: Render character avatars via <NuxtImg> in SSR with descriptive alt + width/height.

artifacts.note: PDF report generation requires plugin Python runtime (blocked by missing python3.10-venv).
